mappings.reason: Deploying a Data Loss Prevention (DLP) solution directly identifies and prevents transmission of sensitive data through enterprise assets, satisfying DM-20's objective to prohibit sharing restricted data via messaging and web channels.
Training workforce on causes of unintentional data exposure, including publishing data to unintended audiences, addresses the human behavior aspect of prohibiting social media sharing.
Enforcing network-based URL filters to limit connections to unapproved websites restricts access to public social media platforms, supporting the prohibition of sharing via these channels.
Establishing a data management process that addresses data handling provides the governance framework required to define and enforce the prohibition on sharing restricted data.
